description:
Tata AIG Medicare Select: All the Details & Surprises You Missed!

In this detailed review, I break down Tata AIG’s newly launched health insurance plan – Medicare Select. Whether you're planning to buy health insurance for the first time or thinking of switching to a better policy, this video is a must-watch!

✅ What’s covered in this video?

Full explanation of Tata AIG Medicare Select benefits

A look at the optional add-ons that can enhance your coverage

Detailed insights into the premium pricing and what you’re actually paying for

Honest discussion on the pros and cons of this new plan

Some surprising features (and missing elements) you should definitely know before buying

I’ve simplified the technical insurance jargon so you can easily understand what this policy offers—and more importantly—whether it’s the right choice for you or not.

CHAPTERS:
00:00 In Today's Video
01:32 Eligibility To Buy This Plan
04:23 Coverages & Benefits (In Detail)
10:20 Addons (Optional Covers)
14:21 Waiting Period
15:33 Pricing (With Add-Ons)
17:00 Discounts (Important)
19:32 My Opinion- Pros & Cons
21:30 My Message To You

🎯 If you're comparing top health insurance plans in India or just want to stay informed about new launches in the insurance industry, this review will give you the clarity you need.

📌 Don’t forget to subscribe for more real, no-fluff insurance insights, policy comparisons, and industry truths.

#TataAIG #MedicareSelect #HealthInsuranceReview #InsuranceImpact #TataAIGHealthInsurance #HealthPlanComparison #InsuranceExplained #TataAIG #MedicareSelect #HealthInsuranceIndia #InsuranceReview #BestHealthInsurance #NewHealthPlan #InsuranceTips #PolicyReview #MedicalInsuranceIndia #HonestReview #InsuranceExplained #TataAIGReview #InsuranceAdvice #IRDAIApproved #InsuranceAwareness

comments.text:
Hello Everyone,
I am sharing my experience with Tata AIG life insurance which is worst and helpless and tension full. Today we are suffering from this case, in future no one should go through this situation and my suggestion is don't buy Tata AIG insurance. 
So, my father had surgery on 21/06/2024 in Niramaya hospital Pune Pimpri Chinchwad. After two days doctor discharged on 23/06/2025. Hospital staff completed billing process with insurance company Tata AIG. Process started around 4 pm. Tata AIG raised attachment by mail and hospital returned attachment, this process goes on till 12:30 pm. They sent approval of claim amount but hospital did not agree with some discounted amount, they sent official mail to Tata AIG, after discussion with hospital staff, This is case between hospital and TATA AIG. we are fighting behind this by calling customer care but all line are not reachable at 10:30 we contact person customer care named Ranjan Ghosh tell him our problems he give us same information which we know, we tell him we are waiting for claim from 4 PM to 10:30 PM we want final mail from your side that petitioner should be discharged we will settle our internal deals between hospital and insurance company.
After that he kept on giving us helpless replies, we called hospital authority how is dealing with all these insurance procedures, he is coming from outside so he takes 10-15 minutes to connect with customer care.In between Tata AIG customer care gives us reason that you call again, disconnects the call.we all know how much time it takes to connect with customer care I told him you have to wait its your duty , he is not able to hold for 10-15 minutes, It was his duty to solve customer's problem, he is totally stupid man, helpless, I think Tata AIG does not know the seriousness of health insurance policy, the man is going through a bad phase of his illness, his family is in tension,
Hospital staff connect Tata AIG customer care, phone is on loud speaker, I was listening there both conversation, hospital staff told them clearly that mail of 4 pm came, they had submitted all billing documents, after that Tata AIG replied around 6 pm that they want 50% discount by the hospital, hospital refused and said only 8% discount they can give, not more than that, Tata again revert for 25%, again 15% finally Tata made up some amount and discount of 71169/- to hospital, refused as it was baseless, after that no mail came from Tata, no action taken, it's between insurance company and hospital.

Why are we struggling in the meanwhile? After that hospital staff found some mistake in the statement which was sent by TATA AIG, he is trying to make way in this situation and help TATA AIG customer care but that guy couldn't understand the situation. Hospital staff told him to call his senior or back office how can handle this situation, after dragging for a long time he forwarded his call to manager Arpit Santra, again he starts from the first page, after all conclusions he also failed to justify his role, this whole process went on till 12:30 AM. After all options we got nothing, we are helpless, we realized that we made a mistake to take policy from TATA AIG. TATA AIG slogan is "ALWAY WITH YOU, TO SPOIL YOUR LIFE"
comments.author: @pravinpawar2446

Hypothyroidism is generally related to thyroid and symptoms arise due to hormonal disorder , bhai ye 100% ped hai and if company ko nhi btaya to kya problem hogi mai Batata hu, 
Tumne koi policy liye usko 25 saal tak chala liye and 26th year me kvi admit huye thẹn surgery se phle all blood test , x ray and medical history assessment hota he and log Dar se sabh khuch batate hai kyuki life ki baat he and wha pakar me aa gye tab company query raise kregi , from how May Day these symptoms happened , what medicine you taken ,previous any treatment taken 6-7 query puchegi , tumko proof ke saath answer dena hoga and if nhi diye claim decline to hoga saath me policy v terminate hogi
